hooks.command: FP=$(python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['file_path'])"); if echo "$FP" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python -m ruff format "$FP" 2>/dev/null; python -m ruff check --fix "$FP" 2>/dev/null; true; fi

FP=$(python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['tool_input']['file_path'])"); BN=$(basename "$FP"); if [ "$BN" = ".env" ]; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not read or modify .env — use .env.example instead' && exit 2; fi
